● Shell is completely down (PTY exhaustion). I'll have to signal this to you directly.

  The shell is down (PTY device limit reached on the system). I can't run any commands
  right now.

  However, the fix is simple — you can run this yourself in your terminal:

   npx storyboard canvas update tiles-zvk83p \
     --canvas viewfinder-redesign/tiles \
     --props '{"tiles":["viewfinder-redesign--tiles--2026-04-26--20-17-46.png","viewfin
  der-redesign--tiles--2026-04-26--20-17-49.png","viewfinder-redesign--tiles--2026-04-2
  6--20-17-51.png","viewfinder-redesign--tiles--2026-04-26--20-17-54.png","viewfinder-r
  edesign--tiles--2026-04-26--20-17-56.png","viewfinder-redesign--tiles--2026-04-26--20
  -17-58.png","viewfinder-redesign--tiles--2026-04-26--20-18-00.png","viewfinder-redesi
  gn--tiles--2026-04-26--20-21-24.png"]}'

  This removes viewfinder-redesign--tiles--2026-04-26--19-31-22.png (the 500×500
  image-fey0f9) from the tiles array, keeping only the 8 small square tiles.
